name: Axis Bank Freecharge Plus Credit Card
exclusions: online skill-based gaming above fee threshold
transactions excluded under Axis Bank Freecharge Plus Credit Card terms
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waived on spends of Rs 50,000 in the preceding card anniversary year, excluding rent and wallet load transactions
additionalBenefits: First-year annual fee listed as nil; second year onward annual fee is Rs 350
1% cashback on all other eligible spends
Dining benefits through Axis Bank dining programme
Foreign currency transaction fee of 3.5% as per Axis Bank fees page

salaried: Eligibility is subject to Axis Bank approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to Axis Bank approval criteria
